_comment: SKILL TREE perk nodes (goal — idea from Michael-Jalloh/SkillEditor, MIT, adapted to DRIVN's LEVEL-BY-DOING model: nodes UNLOCK when the skill's level reaches `level`, EARNED by use — never spent). One branch per skill (ids match ProtoCharacter.SKILLS). The martial_arts nodes are REAL code gates (lv2 kicks / lv4 throws / lv6 finishers, weapon.gd); kinship lv3/lv6 taming, mechanics/scavenging step gates, and per-level effects are the live character.gd formulas — the rest surface those milestones. ProtoSkillTree renders this; add a node = a row here, no code.

driving.name: Drift Master
driving.desc: spin control holds through a powered slide

kinship.name: Pack Alpha
kinship.desc: cheaper taming again + longer horn recall

melee.name: Bonebreaker
melee.desc: +2%/lv knockdown lands them on the ground

martial_arts.name: KICKS
martial_arts.desc: the combo finisher becomes a roundhouse kick

martial_arts.name: THROWS
martial_arts.desc: a shove at grapple range is a guaranteed hip toss

martial_arts.name: FINISHERS
martial_arts.desc: a punch on a downed body lands x3 — ground & pound

stealth.name: Ghost
stealth.desc: creep the edge of a threat's cone unseen

first_aid.name: Medic
first_aid.desc: wounds close fast under a skilled hand
